notes: DLinear, winning config from 4 trials (lookback 52/26, NLinear, trend-kernel 25/51 ablations): nlinear_L52. Single global channel-independent linear model fit on 2672 gap-free series, scored on the 30 representative ones. Target history only (no exogenous inputs), per-series z-score windows, L1 loss. Holdout evaluated once.

DLinear, winning config from 6 trials (RevIN, metric-aligned loss, lookback 52/26, known-future covariates, NLinear reference): dlinear_revin_weighted. Single global channel-independent linear model fit on 2672 gap-free series, scored on the 30 representative ones. Target history only; a globally-shared known-future covariate head was tried and bought nothing. Per-series z-score + RevIN windows, weighted L1, early stopping (patience 5). Holdout evaluated once.
